---
name: Ontology Term Request
about: Request a new term or modification to an existing ontology term
title: "[TERM REQUEST]"
labels: term-request
assignees: ''
---

## Ontology

Which ontology does this request apply to?

- [ ] CMO (Clinical Measurement Ontology)
- [ ] MMO (Measurement Method Ontology)
- [ ] XCO (Experimental Condition Ontology)

---

## Term Information

**Proposed Term Name**

---

**Definition**

Provide a clear and concise definition.

---

**Parent Term**

If known, list the parent ontology term.

---

**Synonyms**

Optional alternative names.

---

**References**

Provide literature references, URLs, or database sources supporting the term.

---

**Additional Context**

Include any extra information that may help curators evaluate the request.
